name: Dabblequil
personality: Dabblequil sports a tiny duck hat on top of its duck head—a bold architectural choice—while its @ eyes spark with ideas arriving faster than the CI can queue them. Waiting for anything, including the build, feedback, or enlightenment, is simply not in Dabblequil's sprint plan.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
